description_long: This kiosk is a modern, open-concept exhibition booth designed for interactive experiences, likely for a technology or gaming company. The structure features a large, curved wooden pod on one side, which appears to serve as an immersive experience chamber, with a printed forest scene visible inside. Two sleek gray sofas face each other across a central aisle, each paired with a digital display stand and a small table, creating comfortable seating areas for visitors. The central area includes a rounded, light-colored counter with a digital screen labeled '4D EXPERIENCE,' suggesting a focus on multimedia presentations. Overhead, a large, rectangular canopy with the Ubisoft logo provides branding and partial enclosure, while additional signage and graphics are integrated into the side panels. The overall layout is open and inviting, with clear pathways and a blend of wood, metal, and digital elements.
description: A modern, open exhibition kiosk with a large wooden pod, digital displays, gray sofas, and a prominent Ubisoft-branded canopy. The design features interactive zones and immersive multimedia elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central counter with '4D EXPERIENCE' display, two facing sofas, digital display stands, and the large Ubisoft-branded canopy overhead.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the immersive wooden pod with a printed forest scene, side graphics, and the arrangement of sofas and display stands.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the curved wooden pod, with the central counter and canopy visible in the background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pod entrance, side graphics, and the open layout of the seating and display areas.
attribute_signage_type: Digital display on central counter, printed logo on overhead canopy, printed side panel graphics, integrated branding elements.
attribute_door_configuration: Single open archway entrance at the side of the wooden pod.
attribute_roof_design: Large, flat, rectangular canopy with open sides, constructed from light-colored panels and featuring a prominent logo.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern, minimalist exhibition style with open layout and integrated digital elements.
